scope.target: SIMPL-001, STD-001, archive rationale, external discussion roundtrip, and roadmap sequencing
constraints: Do not implement simplification or archive operations
Do not assign standards simplification to a release
Preserve Fable 5 as independent planning input
Require repo-native normalization before external feedback becomes repository truth

steps: Create SIMPL-001 as the measured v0.6.0 disposition gate
Create STD-001 as an unassigned independent deliberation item
Record the archive deferral rationale and v0.7.0 preconditions
Publish a provider-neutral ChatGPT/Fable discussion roundtrip guide
Run governance validators and close the planning workflow
validation: AI context navigation and language validation
execution.last_completed_step: Validated the backlog, roadmap, indexes, workflow records, and external discussion roundtrip.
execution.next_action: None in this workflow; resume through SIMPL-001 or STD-001 under their declared handoff conditions.

results.summary: Created measured simplification and standards deliberation backlog boundaries, documented why historical archiving is conditional v0.7 work, and published a provider-neutral ChatGPT/Fable feedback roundtrip.
tests_run: Git for Windows Bash .ai/scripts/check-all.sh --quick: 21/21 required checks passed with zero failures
results.residual_risk: Actual simplification, standards changes, and historical archive migration remain intentionally unimplemented until their evidence and owner-decision gates are satisfied.
